headline: 3 Reasons ITW is Risky and 1 Stock to Buy Instead
summary: Illinois Tool Works has been treading water for the past six months, recording a small return of 0.8% while holding steady at $249.49. The stock also fell short of the S&P 500’s 10.3% gain during that period.
